concerns.text: FR-010 states the system MUST document sample size and power considerations, noting if n<20 per group. However, this requirement is not explicitly anchored to any user story. While it supports US-2, the connection isn't stated within the FR itself.

SC-005 refers to '[deferred]' of group comparisons using associational language. The bracketed placeholder needs to be resolved or clarified. While the constitution allows for deferred values, the sentence is incomplete and doesn't clearly define what is being measured.
